use_cases: Grouping related checkboxes in multi-select form fields
Creating settings or preferences panels with multiple options
Building filter interfaces for e-commerce or data tables
Displaying questionnaire or survey answer options
Implementing consent or agreement checkbox collections
ai_summary: A flexible checkbox group wrapper component that provides consistent labeling, error handling, and layout options for grouping related checkbox inputs. Supports both horizontal and vertical arrangements with optional help text and error states, making it suitable for various form contexts across web applications.
